title: GuardOutput
description: Output of 'migrate-util guard'. Checks guards for a (table, stage) pair without collecting content.

table.description: Normalised FQN of the checked object (schema.name).

stage.description: Stage or skill name checked (e.g. scope, profile, refactoring-sql, generating-model).

passed.description: True when every guard for this stage passed.

guard_results.description: Ordered list of guard check results. Short-circuits on first failure.

code.description: Error code when passed is false.
